description: Create a digital reconstruction diagram of a vehicle collision for insurance claim #XA-9920 using draw.io Desktop, based on the police incident report 'police_report_XA9920.txt' found on the Desktop. The diagram must accurately reflect the accident scenario, intersection geometry (Main St and Elm Ave), and vehicle positions ('Unit 1' Blue Sedan and 'Unit 2' Red Truck) at the point of impact as described in the report. Include text labels for the streets and vehicles, as well as a North arrow indicator. Save the final diagram as 'accident_reconstruction.drawio' and export it as 'accident_reconstruction.png' to the Desktop.
